name: Apple Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the brown sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs, then stir in the molasses.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, alternating with the applesauce. Mix until just combined; the batter may look curdled.
4. Line 4 muffin cups with paper liners. Fill each cup about halfway with batter.
5. Bake on medium-high heat for 2-1/2 minutes in a 4-muffin pan or 3-1/2 minutes in a 6-muffin pan.
6. Cool completely before transferring to an airtight container; store up to 4 weeks.
